description: Style NoteStretchy and comfy room-to-grow style t-shirt from marvel Comics, a pint-sized version of his dad's T-shirt. The go-to piece for summertime games and fun, this tee will last longer than his scruffy escapades!Product DetailsPurple round neck t-shirt, has short sleeves, graphic and rubber print on the front, stitch detailing and brand tag on the left hemMaterial and Care100% CottonHand wash warm with like colours using a mild detergentUse a non chlorine bleach if neededLine dryCool iron do not iron on decorationsDo not dry clean
